游戏降临现实，世界规则颠覆，人类进入全民转职时代。
魔物肆虐！秘境、副本、深渊数不胜数！
恐怖与宝物共存！危险与机遇同行！
唯有成为转职者！升级变强！才能踏上世界之巅！
转职当天，苏傲转职成为所有人公认的最弱职业御兽师？
抱歉！我直接觉醒宠物无限合成系统！
玄金蛇+8颗妖蛇头颅=九头蛇相柳！
机甲女战士+机械之心=机械女帝！
圣天使+逐火圣剑+神王翼=十八翼天使教皇！
各种貌美如花的宠物被苏傲培养成无敌神宠！
从此，神明臣服，万族敬仰！
苏傲成为诸天万族至高无上的唯一主宰！
长生无尽岁月，人生何等漫长。
直到有一天。
苏傲意外将一只小橘猫进行合成之后，变成了一只猫耳、猫尾、JK校服、格子裙、白丝袜的兽耳娘软妹子时，他突然打开了一扇新世界的大门……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o176d55b1a9c5f5a4e78cb4d9ce9425c2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"最爱吃奶糖","author_id":"","book_id":"7254544163004222498","book_name":"开局合成九头蛇相柳，我杀穿高武","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1220人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7254544496044868157","read_count":"1220","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"346362"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"167","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,诸天万界,宠物,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2b3734f712709adb99c3aa824115d6fc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779397683&x-signature=4UxG4IpFW891LKMi3PyYq2ZvYy0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1455342068445884","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.137517e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request
